Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
T-MSIS TAF Annual Provider RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.3 72 

PRVDR_AFLTD_PGM_ID 

LABEL: Provider Affiliated Program Identifier 

DESCRIPTION: A field to identify the Medicaid/CHIP programs, waivers and demonstrations in which the provider 
participates. 

SHORT NAME: PRVDR_AFLTD_PGM_ID 

LONG NAME: PRVDR_AFLTD_PGM_ID 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 50 

FILE(S): APR Affiliated Programs 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual provider TAF 

VALUES:
